summary: Admin Wallet Management (BL Coins Credit) feature fully tested and working. Fixed JWT token compatibility issue between admin_otp_auth.py and main server. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all required elements present and functional.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection returns 403 - not blocking functionality but shows error in console

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: admin_otp_auth.py was using different JWT_SECRET than main server - updated to use same JWT_SECRET from env
FIXED: admin_otp_auth.py token was missing 'user_id' field required by get_current_user - added user_id to token payload
CREATED: admin_accounts entry for test@blendlink.com user to enable admin API access
seed_data_creation: Created admin_accounts entry for test@blendlink.com with super_admin role and full permissions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin wallet management feature is fully functional. Admin login works with test@blendlink.com / admin. The /admin/wallet-management page allows searching users, selecting them, entering amount (with quick buttons), entering reason, and submitting credits. Recent Admin Credits section shows transaction history. WebSocket for real-time analytics shows 403 error but doesn't affect functionality.

admin_login.details: Login with test@blendlink.com / admin works correctly

sidebar_menu_item.details: 'BL Coins Credit' menu item present in admin sidebar

user_search_input.details: User search input with data-testid='user-search-input' found and functional

quick_amount_buttons.details: Quick amount buttons (+100, +1K, +10K, +100K, +1M, +1B) present and functional

submit_button.details: 'Add BL Coins' button with data-testid='submit-credit-btn' found

recent_admin_credits.details: Recent Admin Credits section shows transaction history

e2e_credit_flow.details: Full flow: search user -> select -> enter amount -> enter reason -> submit -> success toast -> transaction in history

preview_section.details: Preview shows recipient name, amount to credit, and new balance before submission

real_time_balance_update.details: Selected user's balance updates immediately after successful credit

fixes_applied.change: Changed SECRET_KEY to use JWT_SECRET from env without fallback default
Added 'user_id' field to token_data for compatibility with get_current_user
